name: video-fetch
description: Fetch, transcribe, and summarize YouTube or Bilibili videos using subtitles, cloud STT, local Whisper, or description fallback.
author: LambertAlpha
capabilities: Fetch video metadata from YouTube and Bilibili
Fallback to ElevenLabs STT or local Whisper
Fallback to description when transcripts are unavailable
Handle Bilibili cookie auth and proxy settings
